mapper.sql: id, project_id, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, current_stage, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, cancel_requested, worker_id, lease_until, last_heartbeat_at, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into generate_task ( project_id, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, current_stage, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, cancel_requested, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{status}, #{currentStage}, coalesce(#{retryCount}, 0), coalesce(#{maxRetryCount}, 3), #{errorMessage}, coalesce(#{cancelRequested}, 0), 1, 1 )
mapper.select: select from generate_task where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0

select id, project_id, task_id, attempt_no, stage_code, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, cost_ms, created_at, updated_at from task_stage_log where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0 order by attempt_no asc, started_at asc, id asc
mapper.update: update generate_task set status = #{nextStatus}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_message = null, cancel_requested = 0, worker_id = null, lease_until = null, last_heartbeat_at = null, finished_at = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{taskId} and status = 'FAILED' and retry_count < max_retry_count and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = 'CANCELED', cancel_requested = 1, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{taskId} and status in ('PENDING', 'QUEUED', 'RETRYING') and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = 'RUNNING', current_stage = #{currentStage}, worker_id = #{workerId}, lease_until = timestampadd(second, #{leaseSeconds}, current_timestamp), last_heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, started_at = coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp), updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and status = 'QUEUED' and cancel_requested = 0 and deleted = 0

update generate_task set lease_until = timestampadd(second, #{leaseSeconds}, current_timestamp), last_heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId} and cancel_requested = 0 and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = 'SUCCESS', current_stage = #{currentStage}, worker_id = null, lease_until = null, last_heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId} and cancel_requested = 0 and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = 'FAILED', current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, worker_id = null, lease_until = null, last_heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId} and cancel_requested = 0 and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = 'CANCELED', current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, worker_id = null, lease_until = null, last_heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and worker_id = #{workerId} and cancel_requested = 1 and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into task_stage_log ( project_id, task_id, attempt_no, stage_code, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, cost_ms, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{attemptNo}, #{stageCode}, #{status}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{costMs}, 1, 1 )

insert into task_outbox ( task_id, project_id, event_type, payload, status, next_delivery_at, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{taskId}, #{projectId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{nextDeliveryAt}, 1, 1 ) on duplicate key update payload = values(payload), status = values(status), next_delivery_at = values(next_delivery_at), error_message = null, updated_by = 1
mapper.select: select id, task_id, project_id, event_type, payload, status, delivery_count, next_delivery_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at from task_outbox where deleted = 0 and status = 'PENDING' and next_delivery_at <= current_timestamp order by next_delivery_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update task_outbox set status = 'DELIVERED', error_message = null, updated_by = 1 where id = #{eventId} and deleted = 0

update task_outbox set status = #{status}, delivery_count = delivery_count + 1, error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_delivery_at = timestampadd(second, #{nextDeliverySeconds}, current_timestamp), updated_by = 1 where id = #{eventId} and deleted = 0
